title: SEO Specialist

rationales.taskAutomation: Keyword research, meta-tag optimization, technical audits, and content briefs are digital, tool-driven tasks AI now runs end-to-end.
rationales.toolMaturity: AI SEO platforms like Surfer and Clearscope are mature, widely-shipped products embedded in the standard SEO workflow.
rationales.adoption: AI-assisted audits and keyword research are now the mainstream default across SEO teams.
rationales.agenticExposure: Agents can run technical audits and content-brief generation loops unsupervised, and AI search itself is reshaping what the role even optimizes for.

salarySource: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 13-1161 Market Research Analysts and Marketing Specialists, p25-p75 rounded
insight: Audits and keyword clustering now run on agents, and the audience is shifting from search results to AI answers. Specialists who master AI-search visibility and can still touch the technical stack remain in demand.
